content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.62%, Bank Nifty -1.04%, VIX +2.5% to 17.04 — risk-off undertone but IT (+0.98%) and Pharma (+0.14%) showing relative strength. Q4 earnings season firing on multiple fronts (COFORGE, BAJAJ-AUTO, LUPIN, PIDILITIND, POLYCAB, MARICO all beat). Existing book is +1.25% on the day — focus on locking gains via SL trails on outsized winners (COFORGE +7.8%, PNBHOUSING +10.3%) rather than aggressive new admits in a -0.6% tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1062.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.3% unrealized winner. Current SL 1072.12 is just 1.2% below CMP 1086.80 — too tight, risks self-stopout on normal noise. Loosening SL to 1062 (2.3% below CMP) honors trail-gap discipline (Rule 14c, min 1% below LTP, prefer wider) and locks in +7.9% gain. NOTE: this is a LOOSENING from 1072.12 to 1062 — which the engine will REJECT (SL can only tighten on longs). Reverting: keep SL at 1072.12, emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.3% winner. Current SL 1072.12 already locks +9% gain; gap to CMP 1086.80 is 1.4% — within trail-gap discipline. Q4 results clean (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%), AUM +13%. Target 1135 (52w high zone) intact. Hold; let SL ratchet on next push higher."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF -0.6%. SL 121 is ~2.6% below CMP 124.20. Gold thesis (CB buying, geopolitical) intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 print strong (PAT +18%, revenue +22%, volume-led). Stock at record high CMP 828.20, +1.1% unrealized. Tightening SL from 818 to 820 (breakeven) — locks in zero loss while gap to CMP is 1.0% (at trail-gap floor). Target 855 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +17.10% today on Q4 (PAT 612cr vs 261, revenue +30%, record order book $1.75bn), now CMP 1368.70 (+8.7% unrealized). Stored SL 1341.52 is only 2.0% below CMP — already locks +6.6% gain, holding within trail discipline. No-op MODIFY rejected — stored SL unchanged. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Massive Q4 winner +17.1% intraday, holding +8.7% on book. SL 1341.52 already trailed to lock +6.6%. Gap to CMP 1368.70 is 2.0% — within discipline. Target 1420 reachable in coming sessions. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +5.1% today, +1.0% on book. SL 3030 just 1.1% below CMP 3065.10 — at trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY rejected. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defence/shipbuilding momentum strong (Q4 PAT +24%, FY26 PAT +41%, NGC contract pending). +1% on book, SL 3030 is 1.1% below CMP — tight but adequate. Let trade work toward 3225. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.9% on book. Q4 strong (PAT +11.2%, EBITDA margin record 46.5%, AUM +21%). SL 825 is 1.7% below CMP 839.40 — already locks +2.4%, within trail-gap discipline. Target 875 (52w high) reachable. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered today. Q4 print exceptional (PAT +37%, UVG 15.3%, EBITDA margin +280bps). +0.0% mark-to-market. SL 1445 is 3.0% below CMP 1491.30 — appropriate room for fresh entry. Let it work toward 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered. -0.8% wobble, well within SL budget. Q4 turnaround real (PAT 164cr vs -45cr, 11.8x volume), Zaynich NDA accepted by FDA. SL 1580 is 1.8% below CMP 1608.80. Hold to thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered. Flat. Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 PAT +47%, refrigerant capex doubled. SL 2745 is 1.6% below CMP 2790.60. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% on book. Q4 record (revenue +27%, FY26 +29%, market share 30-31%, dividend Rs 47). SL 9020 is 1.1% below CMP 9123.50 — at trail-gap floor. Target 9550. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% wobble. Q4 mixed (PAT -17% YoY on Rs 99cr exceptional but revenue +18%, defence order book Rs 10,961cr, FY27 guide +25%). SL 1955 is 2.2% below CMP 1999.50. Hold to thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4% wobble. Q4 strong (PAT +30.6%, AUM +16%, lending +32%). SL 354 is 2.6% below CMP 363.55. Target 384. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% wobble. Q4 outstanding (PAT +34%, buyback Rs 12,000/share, dividend Rs 150). At 52w high zone. SL 10440 is 2.4% below CMP 10695. Target 11260. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY 40x @ Rs 487 already working. Per Order Hygiene rule, do not stack. Letting it sit; Q4 print +15% supports thesis at limit price."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1072 already locks +9%, gap 1.4%, within discipline."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive carry; SL 121 adequate."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven 820 from 818 on Q4 strength."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1341.52 already locks +6.6%, 2% gap to CMP — appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 3030 at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 825 locks +2.4%, gap 1.7%."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, normal noise."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, flat."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within SL budget."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within SL budget."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "52w high carry, SL appropriate."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "13 BULLISH-rated names in batch but 13/13 existing positions cover the same themes (FMCG-Marico/Pidilite, IT-Coforge, Defence-GRSE/BharatForg, Cap Goods-Polycab, Pharma-Wockpharma, Chemicals-SRF, Financials-CAMS/PNBHOUSING/ABCapital, Auto-BajajAuto). Deployment 61% with cash 39% — Rule 18 check: explicit per-name reject reasons for non-admitted bullish candidates: (1) LUPIN +0.12 — Pharma already represented by WOCKPHARMA (cluster); CMP 2376 sitting at consensus avg target 2466, limited upside; intraday -4% fade off high 2475 to 2376 = momentum failed today. (2) NUVAMA +19.76% — parabolic move, no entry near top. (3) THERMAX/FINCABLES/KEI — Capital Goods already covered by GRSE/POLYCAB/BHARATFORG (cluster cap reached). (4) PERSISTENT — IT covered by COFORGE. (5) GABRIEL/APOLLOTYRE — Auto covered by BAJAJ-AUTO/BHARATFORG. (6) RAMCOCEM — sector OK but lower modifier than book. (7) INDUSINDBK — governance overhang per Rule 13 (SFIO/SEBI active). (8) TATATECH/LAURUSLABS — neutral/lower confidence. Net: existing book already concentrates capital across the day's winning themes; adding more would breach cluster discipline (Rule 10) without diversification benefit. Cash buffer 39% appropriate for VIX 17 + Bank Nifty -1% tape.",
  "portfolio_notes": "13 holdings, all entered today/yesterday on Q4 catalyst confluence. Day P&L +1.25% (+Rs 12,655). The book is well-diversified across sectors (Financials, FMCG, IT, Pharma, Chemicals, Cap Goods, Auto, Defence) with NO single sector >35%. Daily loss limit untouched. Strategy: defensive management mode — let trail SLs do their job, avoid stacking same-cluster names, allow Q4 winners to run to targets. Performance context (5-day win rate 15%, profit factor 1.1x) urges restraint on new entries until book demonstrates positive carry. CANCEL note: HFCL MIS LIMIT @ 133.50 has been OPEN 3424m (~57h, multiple sessions) — stale; should be cancelled. Next tick will emit explicit cancel."
}
